top3.sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < (SELECT MIN(PLT) FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lower_than_normal,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > (SELECT MAX(PLT) FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS higher_than_normal
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < (SELECT MIN(PLT) FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lower_than_normal,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > (SELECT MAX(PLT) FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT > 150) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS higher_than_normal
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL AND PLT > 0;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < (SELECT MIN(PLT) FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lower_than_normal,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > (SELECT MAX(PLT) FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS higher_than_normal
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN PLT < 150 THEN 1 END) AS lower_than_normal,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 END) AS higher_than_normal
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN PLT < 150 THEN 1 END) AS lower_than_normal,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 END) AS higher_than_normal
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL AND PLT > 0;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < (SELECT MIN(PLT) FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lower_than_normal,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > (SELECT MAX(PLT) FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS higher_than_normal
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN PLT < 150 THEN 1 END) AS lower_than_normal,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 END) AS higher_than_normal
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < 150 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lower_than_normal,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS higher_than_normal
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < (SELECT MIN(PLT) FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lower_than_normal,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > (SELECT MAX(PLT) FROM Laboratory WHERE PLT > 0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS higher_than_normal
FROM Laboratory
WHERE PLT IS NOT NULL;
